endpoint.label: Veo 3.1
endpoint.summary: Submit Veo 3.1 fast, lite, and quality jobs through APIDot's unified async generation endpoint.
endpoint.about: Veo 3.1 uses the shared APIDot submit-and-track workflow. `veo3.1-fast`, `veo3.1-lite`, and `veo3.1-quality` all support text-to-video. `veo3.1-fast` also supports frame and reference image-to-video, while `veo3.1-quality` supports frame image-to-video only. `veo3.1-lite` is text-to-video only.
bestPractices: Use `veo3.1-lite` for the lowest-cost text-only iteration, `veo3.1-fast` for fast text or image-guided runs, and `veo3.1-quality` for premium output.
Keep prompts explicit about motion, camera perspective, native audio intent, and visual continuity.
Use `input.generate_type: "frame"` for first/last-frame workflows. Use `reference` only with `veo3.1-fast`.

faq.question: Which Veo 3.1 model id should I use?
faq.answer: `veo3.1-lite` is text-only and cost-efficient. `veo3.1-fast` supports text-to-video plus frame/reference image-to-video. `veo3.1-quality` supports text-to-video and frame image-to-video for the highest-quality output.

faq.question: How does `input.generate_type` work?
faq.answer: Only include `input.generate_type` when sending images. Use `frame` for up to two images: first frame and optional last frame. Use `reference` for up to three reference images, and only with `veo3.1-fast`.

faq.question: Can `veo3.1-lite` use images?
faq.answer: No. `veo3.1-lite` should not receive `input.generate_type` or `input.image_urls`; submit text prompts only.

request.name: callback_url
request.description: Optional webhook callback URL for terminal task updates.

request.name: input.prompt
request.description: Main prompt describing scene, motion, audio intent, and target aesthetic.

request.name: input.duration
request.description: Requested duration in seconds. Veo 3.1 is fixed at 8 seconds.

request.name: input.generate_type
request.description: Optional image-to-video mode. Use `frame` for first/last-frame control or `reference` for reference images. Do not send this field for text-to-video or `veo3.1-lite`; `reference` is only supported by `veo3.1-fast`.

request.name: input.image_urls
request.description: Optional image inputs for supported image-to-video runs. `frame` supports 1-2 images; `reference` supports 1-3 images. Do not send this field to `veo3.1-lite`.

response.name: code
response.description: HTTP-style status code. Successful submits return `200`.

response.name: data.task_id
response.description: Async task identifier returned immediately after submission.

errors.name: invalid_request
errors.description: Missing fields, unsupported generate mode, or invalid image input combinations.

errors.name: authentication_error
errors.description: Missing, expired, or invalid Bearer API key.

errors.name: insufficient_credits
errors.description: The current prepaid balance cannot cover the Veo 3.1 request.

errors.name: rate_limited
errors.description: The API key is temporarily above the allowed submission rate.

sample.curl:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.apidot.ai/api/generate/submit \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <APIDOT_API_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "model": "veo3.1-lite",
  "callback_url": "https://your-domain.com/callback",
  "input": {
    "prompt": "A miniature city waking up at sunrise, cinematic light, smooth camera motion",
    "duration": 8,
    "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
    "resolution": "720p"
  }
}
'
sample.python:
import os
from apidot import APIDot

client = APIDot(api_key=os.environ["APIDOT_API_KEY"])

request = {
    "model": "veo3.1-lite",
    "callback_url": "https://your-domain.com/callback",
    "input": {
        "prompt": "A miniature city waking up at sunrise, cinematic light, smooth camera motion",
        "duration": 8,
        "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
        "resolution": "720p"
    }
}

response = client.generate(
    endpoint="/api/generate/submit",
    **request
)

input.prompt: A miniature city waking up at sunrise, cinematic light, smooth camera motion
Dolphins jumping in a bright blue ocean with native ambient sound
Animate the subject from the first frame into a smooth final pose
Create a dynamic product scene using the supplied visual references
A premium cinematic landscape reveal with natural camera motion and native ambience
Create a premium cinematic continuation from the supplied first frame
A miniature city waking up at sunrise, cinematic light, smooth camera motion
